case_title: GUILLERMO ABURTO VS. JOSE LENIN BLANDON TORRES

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2024 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY ABURTO, GUILLERMO AS TO DEFENDANT BLANDON TORRES, JOSE LENIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF GUILLERMO ABURTO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE LENIN BLANDON TORRES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER DANIEL NAVARRO. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM AS THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2024 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY ABURTO, GUILLERMO BLANDON TORRES, JOSE LENIN

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABURTO, GUILLERMO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLANDON TORRES, JOSE LENIN $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
